Profile

B.Com Candidate — Class of 2026

01Profile

A research-first
approach to strategy.

Every brief gets the same treatment: structured research, a defensible model, and a presentation that earns the room's attention.

I work at the intersection of numbers and narrative — building financial models that hold up under scrutiny, and translating policy and market research into roadmaps that evaluators can act on.

Across seven national finals, the constraint has always been the same: 24–48 hours to understand an industry, build a model, and pitch a strategy to people who've seen a hundred decks before. That pressure has shaped how I work — fast triage of what matters, disciplined use of AI tools like Claude and Gemini for research synthesis, and a habit of building the financial backbone before the slides.

Outside competitions, I bring the same rigor to internships: auditing onboarding records, reconciling client accounts, and building dashboards that hold up when leadership actually opens them.

Strategic Research Financial Modeling Policy Analysis Excel Dashboards Audit & Reconciliation AI-Accelerated Research Stakeholder Presentations Process Improvement

05Research & Projects

Independent research,
real survey data.

A primary-research project applying statistical methods to a question close to home: how financially literate are college students?

Primary Research

Financial Literacy Awareness Among DEI College Students

  • Surveyed 68 students across departments at Dayal Bagh Educational Institute
  • Developed a custom Financial Literacy Index to evaluate awareness and saving habits
  • Applied chi-square analysis, identifying 58.8% of students as highly financially literate
  • Found significant age-wise differences in financial literacy outcomes
Industry Simulations

Forage Job Simulations — Goldman Sachs & Tata

  • Goldman Sachs — Operations Job Simulation: foundations of operations and facilitating ultra-high-net-worth transactions
  • Goldman Sachs — Risk Job Simulation: introduction to risk and evaluating client profiles & real estate investments
  • Tata — ESG Job Simulation: client needs analysis, comparative sustainability assessment, and fitment matrix presentation
